utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each one is fully specified with provider details, coverage descriptions, and both monthly and annual costs, matching the requested format. Therefore, all items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four LifeFirst policies: (1) LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health (policy LFH-ST-001), (2) LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health (policy LFM-ST-002), (3) LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property/home contents (policy LFP-ST-003), (4) LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel (policy LFT-ST-004), and (5) additional LifeFirst services combining equipment protection and premium membership (HOP-005, PM-006). From the ground-truth data: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage → physical_health has rating 8; 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mental_health has rating 8; 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection → home_content has rating 8; 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance has rating 7. The additional services correspond conceptually to 'Home Office Protection' (rating 8), 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10), and 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 6). Since the plan describes both equipment protection (similar to Home Office Protection) and premium concierge membership with gym reimbursement, we can map these to those three rated items. Therefore, the ratings linked to the final coverage plan elements are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (Property) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (Travel) = 7, and Additional Services (Equipment Protection & Premium Membership) = average of related items (8,10,6) but we list each explicitly.
